caption: A video game simulation of an American football game takes place in a large stadium under bright lights. Players in black uniforms and white uniforms are on a green field marked with white lines. On-screen text displays "2nd & 10", a score of "14" to "7", and a game clock at "0:34" in the "3rd" quarter. In a small inset window, a man with light-colored hair wearing a dark shirt reacts to the game. In the first frame, a player in black tackles a player in white to the ground. As the sequence progresses, the tackled player is brought down completely, and other players in black uniforms move toward the action. A player wearing number 22 in black runs toward the pile, while other players in green uniforms stand along the sideline. The game clock counts down from "47" to "30" seconds.
